testcase.name: testTripPlanning
testcase.system-out:

"toolInput": "东京" } ], "summary": "3天东京之旅：涵盖热门景点、舒适住宿和美食体验。", "estimatedBudget": 5000.0 } 2026-05-31T17:59:08.851+08:00 DEBUG 14560 --- [trip-agent] [oundedElastic-1] c.t.agent.planning.PlanningAgent
